text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking around the shopping district with
Bamboo Memory when she suddenly stops to look
around.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...!
Th-this is it! ...No doubt about it!
choice_data_list: What's up?
What's up?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This is the shopping district from a school-life
drama I used to watch with my dad!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I never noticed it was so close to
the academy! Ah, I guess they probably changed
out all the signs and stuff for filming!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
See the traditional Japanese sweets shop over
there? That's where the main character and the
rival gang leader meet for the first time! Oh! And
over there's where they have their final battle!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wow! This is bringing back so many memories! I
wanna look around some more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, a hyped-up Bamboo Memory takes me on
an unexpected tour of the locations from the
show she likes.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Man, this is great! All the memories from when I
used to watch the show are flooding back to me!
choice_data_list: I'm glad you had fun!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess it's about time we head back to the
academy! But I'd love to come back here every
now and then.

text_block_list.name: Tracen Academy Student
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's with you guys?! L-let me through!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What's the meaning of this?! Fighting is not
the answer!

text_block_list.name: Tracen Academy Student
text_block_list.text:
Agh! B-Bamboo! These people just started
bothering me out of nowhere, and—

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya talkin' about?! You're the one
trespassin' on our turf like you own the place!
choice_data_list: Okay, everybody! Let's all just calm down...
Okay, everybody! Let's all just calm down...

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I got a better idea. How 'bout you shut your
mouth?! Gotta problem with that?!
Damn Goody Two-shoes, thinkin' you can look
down on us...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What?! Of course I have a problem! I have several words to say to all of y—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
They haven't seen anything yet! Wait till you see
me swing to the finish with just one hand!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...!
I almost let myself get out of hand again...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But, discipline must be uph—no! I'm getting out of
control... Ugh! What should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then it hits me. This seems like a situation
straight out of that show she likes so much!
choice_data_list: What would the characters in that show do?
What would the characters in that show do?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That show? Ah! That's right!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey! If you've got a problem with one of my
students, you can take it up with me! That is, if
you've got the guts!

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What'd you just say to me?! You got any idea who
you're talkin' to?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Heh! If you don't like it, why don't you come over
here and tell it to my face?

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... It's no use... We can't beat students from the academy in a race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you say that, but it looks like you've still
got some energy left in you! Or am I wrong about
you?

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What'd you say?! Damn it! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Delinquents
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... What a run! Ooh, that's refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Y-you've been dragging us all over the place! I
don't care if you call that refreshing or whatever,
but I don't give a crap about any of this anymore!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Now you get it! Instead of fighting, you
can just go for a run and you'll feel right as rain!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
From now on, you come down to the academy
whenever you start seeing red! Ask for Bamboo
Memory, the head of the disciplinary committee!
I'll take you on anytime!

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Hah! All right, then! I'll remember that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Thanks to you, everything worked
out just fine!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If you give your all until you're left gasping for
air, you'll definitely come to an understanding!
Just like in the show!
choice_data_list: That's great...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. It used to always be my dad and me
tearing ahead, and my mom would have to stop
us. We complemented each other well.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And now, you're the one who stops me when I
need it. Funny how things pan out! Hehehe...
choice_data_list: I guess we make a good team!
I guess we make a good team!
I'm sure you'd be just as capable on your own.
I'm sure you'd be just as capable on your own.

You handled that disciplinary problem
brilliantly!

You handled that disciplinary problem
brilliantly!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And now, you're the one who stops me when I
need it. Funny how things pan out! Hehehe...
choice_data_list: I guess we make a good team!
I guess we make a good team!
I'm sure you'd be just as capable on your own.
I'm sure you'd be just as capable on your own.

You handled that disciplinary problem
brilliantly!

You handled that disciplinary problem
brilliantly!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You bet we do! And while we're here, let's shout
at the sunset together! It'll be just like another
scene from the show!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You and me! When we're together, we're the
strongest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we both yell passionately at the sunset
until our voices start to go.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What?! Even if I could, I wouldn't want that!
Everything is way more exciting when you're with
me! I'm happiest with you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We're always gonna be together! Always! And
that's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with that reassurance from Bamboo
Memory, we bump our fists together passionately
in a vow of friendship.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you think so? Well, I guess I was able to
connect with those troublemakers!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I've got to keep working hard! I want to keep
growing as both the head of the disciplinary
committee and as a person...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I want to go beyond being just the committee
chair! I'll become the lord of all discipline! That's
my new goal!
